reviews.comment:
Deben poner un posnet en cada fila de surtidores, en viaje al sur tuve más de 45 min de demora para cargar combustible. Había uno solo y ahora no es solo pagar el combustible, se descargan promos de serviclub, descuentos del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
They need to put a POS terminal at every pump. On my trip south, I had a delay of over 45 minutes to fill up. There was only one, and now it's not just about paying for fuel; you also have to download Serviclub promotions and ACA discounts.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNZaVlmNTJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelentes las habitaciones, las camas de 10.
No tiene restaurant como el motel de Villa Bordeu que posee restaurant propio, hay que cenar o desayunar en el full de la estacion de servicio. Siempre tuvimos buena atención de parte del personal.

(Translated by Google)
The rooms are excellent, the beds are 10/10.
It doesn't have a restaurant like the Villa Bordeu motel, which has its own restaurant; you have to eat dinner or breakfast at the gas station. We always received good service from the staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURvLTZHLXN3RRAB
